# Auto-generated by generate_experiments.py
# Application: 04-multithread
# Generated from: 04-multithread/experiment/experiments.yaml

include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/IaRaApplications.cmake)


# Experiment set: regression

iara_add_test_instance(
    NAME "04-multithread_regression_vf-sequential"
    EXPERIMENT_SET "regression"
    APPLICATION_DIR "applications/04-multithread"
    ENTRY "04-multithread"
    SCHEDULER "vf-sequential"
    PARAMETERS "scheduler=vf-sequential"
    BUILD_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/04-multithread/regression/04-multithread_regression_vf-sequential"
    DEFINES "SCHEDULER=vf-sequential"
    LINKER_ARGS ""
)

iara_add_test_instance(
    NAME "04-multithread_regression_vf-omp"
    EXPERIMENT_SET "regression"
    APPLICATION_DIR "applications/04-multithread"
    ENTRY "04-multithread"
    SCHEDULER "vf-omp"
    PARAMETERS "scheduler=vf-omp"
    BUILD_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/04-multithread/regression/04-multithread_regression_vf-omp"
    DEFINES "SCHEDULER=vf-omp"
    LINKER_ARGS ""
)

iara_add_test_instance(
    NAME "04-multithread_regression_vf-enkits"
    EXPERIMENT_SET "regression"
    APPLICATION_DIR "applications/04-multithread"
    ENTRY "04-multithread"
    SCHEDULER "vf-enkits"
    PARAMETERS "scheduler=vf-enkits"
    BUILD_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/04-multithread/regression/04-multithread_regression_vf-enkits"
    DEFINES "SCHEDULER=vf-enkits"
    LINKER_ARGS ""
)

# ==============================================================================
# CTest Configuration - Sequential Test Execution
# ==============================================================================

# Disable test parallelization to ensure accurate compilation timing
# (parallel builds can interfere with per-test compilation measurements)
set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY CTEST_LAUNCH_RULE "")

# Set CTest to run tests serially, not in parallel
get_property(test_names DIRECTORY PROPERTY TESTS)
if(test_names)
    set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY CTEST_PROCESSES 1)
endif()
